orderingSummary: Front/back matter exists around the curated run, but is not part of the 40-marker answer key.

ambiguousSpots.issue: Transcript opener gap makes the start harder to see directly.
ambiguousSpots.rationale: The embedded EPUB marker still points at the correct boundary, even though the transcript evidence is less explicit.
Treat the EPUB marker as correct even when the transcript opener is not cleanly exposed.

currentNodeOutput.note: The accepted boundaries are in the right overall order, but the current output is missing the two ambiguous chapter starts.

rationale: This case is mostly straightforward once the front matter is separated out; the only real judgment calls are the two opener-gap boundaries.
